title: Fiery Gooey Irish Beef Stew
description: A hearty Irish stew featuring tender beef and a rich, spicy broth, made with halal-friendly ingredients. This dish is perfect for a cold winter's night.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef to the pot and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion, carrots, and potatoes to the pot and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the hot beef broth, tomato paste, Worcestershire sauce, thyme, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper to the pot.
Stir to combine, then bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the stew has thickened and the flavors have melded together, about 20 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Let the stew cool completely before refrigerating or freezing.
Reheat the stew over low heat, stirring occasionally, until warmed through.
